metadata.description: Workflow primitives that keep AI-assisted coding from losing the threads that matter — including the /retro retrospective command.

plugins.name: threads
plugins.description: Process tooling for Claude Code. Its first command, /threads:retro, reviews work as process telemetry — how it happened, not whether the code is correct. Runs a fresh-context sub-agent audit of the session record by default; `quick` runs a self-pass only. Explicit invocation only; never auto-fires.
